residual_risks: The backend-boundary family is now closed on merged 710c92eb, but any future widening to a public LowerableBackend.IR, a second executable backend IR, lazy STG machinery, fallback/runtime-rescue behavior, or a broader backend contract still requires a later accepted roadmap revision.

focused_row_7_guard.command: cabal test mlf2-test --test-show-details=direct --test-options='--match "/Repository guardrails/backend-boundary mechanism table and closeout ledger stay synchronized/"'

evidence_summary: Reviewed the canonical round-228 worktree against master commit 710c92eb8f4d87961f4b7bc76b5dc21f645f9220, where HEAD, master, and merge-base all match and the live round exists as an uncommitted worktree diff. The retry kept the carried attempt-1 payload on TODO.md, implementation_notes.md, and the mechanism table frozen via the recorded /tmp/round-228-attempt2-frozen.json baseline, repaired CHANGELOG.md so the closeout bullet now restates the preserved one executable eager backend IR / no public LowerableBackend.IR / no lazy STG boundary on merged 710c92eb, and strengthened the row-7 RepoGuard changelog marker list to require the same wording. Lineage, pointer-stub, diff-hygiene, independent closeout-ledger, retry-scope, boundary, focused row-7 guard, independent mechanism-table, and full cabal gates all passed. The family now closes with all seven mechanism-table rows at YES without introducing any second public backend IR, public LowerableBackend.IR surface, lazy STG machinery, or broader backend widening.
